---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{r}
# BiocManager::install("mygene")
# library(mygene)
library(dplyr)
library(parseMetab)
```

# GSVA score survival analysis
```{r}
dirs = list.files(path = "../data/TCGA/", full.names = TRUE)  # list files/folders in current directory
dirs = dirs[file.info(dirs)$isdir] %>% gsub(".*/", "", .)              # keep only directories
print(dirs)

cancers2analyze = sapply(dirs, function(c) {
    meta = openxlsx::read.xlsx(paste0("../data/TCGA/",c,"/Clinical_",c,".xlsx"))
    meta0 = openxlsx::read.xlsx(paste0("../data/TCGA/",c,"/Meta_",c,".xlsx"))
    meta = meta0[, c("cases.submitter_id", "sample.submitter_id", "sample_type")] %>% 
        setNames(c("submitter_id", "sample.submitter_id", "sample_type")) %>%
        dplyr::right_join(meta, by="submitter_id")
    meta$sample.submitter_id = gsub("-", ".", meta$sample.submitter_id)
    meta = meta %>% filter(sample_type == "Primary Tumor")
    gsvaFile = paste0("../results/TCGA/Limma_GSVA/",c,"/GSVAscores.csv")
    if (file.exists(gsvaFile)){
        GSVAscores = 
            read.table(gsvaFile, 
            sep="\t", header=TRUE)
        # print(intersect(meta$sample.submitter_id , colnames(GSVAscores)))
        # print(meta[!(is.na(meta$days_to_death)&is.na(meta$days_to_last_follow_up)),] %>% nrow())
        # print(meta[!(is.na(meta$days_to_death)),] %>% nrow())
        if(nrow(meta[!(is.na(meta$days_to_death)),])>50) {
            return(c)
        } else {return(NA)}
    } else {return(NA)}
}) %>% as.character()

cancers2analyze = cancers2analyze[!is.na(cancers2analyze)] %>% as.character()
saveRDS(cancers2analyze, "../results/SurvivalAnalysis_TCGA/cancers.RDS")

outDir = "../results/SurvivalAnalysis_TCGA/coxreg/"
outDir %>% dir.create(., recursive=T, showWarnings=FALSE)
metabolicSur_rslts = lapply(cancers2analyze, function(c) {
    print(c)
    meta = openxlsx::read.xlsx(paste0("../data/TCGA/",c,"/Clinical_",c,".xlsx"))
    meta0 = openxlsx::read.xlsx(paste0("../data/TCGA/",c,"/Meta_",c,".xlsx"))
    meta = meta0[, c("cases.submitter_id", "sample.submitter_id", "sample_type")] %>% 
        setNames(c("submitter_id", "sample.submitter_id", "sample_type")) %>%
        dplyr::right_join(meta, by="submitter_id")
    meta$sample.submitter_id = gsub("-", ".", meta$sample.submitter_id)
    meta = meta %>% filter(sample_type == "Primary Tumor")
    gsvaFile = paste0("../results/TCGA/Limma_GSVA/",c,"/GSVAscores.csv")
    GSVAscores = 
        read.table(gsvaFile, 
        sep="\t", header=TRUE)
    paste0(outDir, "/", c, "/") %>% 
        dir.create(., recursive=T, showWarnings=FALSE)
    metabolicSur_rslt = metabolicSurvival_coxreg(meta, GSVAscores)
    saveRDS(metabolicSur_rslt, paste0(outDir, "/", c, "/metabolicSur_rslt.RDS"))
    openxlsx::write.xlsx(list(metabolicSur_rslt)%>%setNames(c), 
        file=paste0(outDir, "/", c, "/metabolicSur_rslt.xlsx"))
    metabolicSur_rslt
}) %>% setNames(cancers2analyze)


outDir2 = "../results/SurvivalAnalysis_TCGA/Kaplan_Meier/"
outDir2 %>% dir.create(., recursive=T, showWarnings=FALSE)
metabolicSur_rslts_KM = lapply(cancers2analyze, function(c) {
    print(c)
    meta = openxlsx::read.xlsx(paste0("../data/TCGA/",c,"/Clinical_",c,".xlsx"))
    meta0 = openxlsx::read.xlsx(paste0("../data/TCGA/",c,"/Meta_",c,".xlsx"))
    meta = meta0[, c("cases.submitter_id", "sample.submitter_id", "sample_type")] %>% 
        setNames(c("submitter_id", "sample.submitter_id", "sample_type")) %>%
        dplyr::right_join(meta, by="submitter_id")
    meta$sample.submitter_id = gsub("-", ".", meta$sample.submitter_id)
    meta = meta %>% filter(sample_type == "Primary Tumor")
    gsvaFile = paste0("../results/TCGA/Limma_GSVA/",c,"/GSVAscores.csv")
    GSVAscores = 
        read.table(gsvaFile, 
        sep="\t", header=TRUE)
    paste0(outDir2, "/", c, "/") %>% 
        dir.create(., recursive=T, showWarnings=FALSE)
    metabolicSur_rslt = 
        metabolicSurvival_Kaplan_Meier(meta, 
        GSVAscores, outdir=paste0(outDir2, "/", c, "/"))
    saveRDS(metabolicSur_rslt, paste0(outDir2, "/", c, "/metabolicSur_rslt.RDS"))
    openxlsx::write.xlsx(list(metabolicSur_rslt)%>%setNames(c), 
        file=paste0(outDir2, "/", c, "/metabolicSur_rslt.xlsx"))
    metabolicSur_rslt
}) %>% setNames(cancers2analyze)



```

```{r}
# Only keep features with SchoenfeldResidualTest_pvalue > 0.05
metabolicSur_rslts = metabolicSur_rslts[
    metabolicSur_rslts$SchoenfeldResidualTest_pvalue>0.05,]

outdir = "../results/TCGA"
databaseDIR=paste0(outdir, "/KEGG_metabolism/")
kegg_metab_dbs = 
    list(kegg_metab_db = readRDS(paste0(databaseDIR, "/KEGG_metabolism_db.RDS")),
    kegg_metab_db_table = readRDS(paste0(databaseDIR, "/KEGG_metabolism_db_table.RDS")))

visualizeDiffFeatures_sur(
    metabolicSur_rslts=metabolicSur_rslts, 
    kegg_metab_db_table = kegg_metab_dbs$kegg_metab_db_table,
    outDir, w=NULL, h=NULL)

# visualizeDiffFeatures_sur(
#     metabolicSur_rslts=metabolicSur_rslts_KM, 
#     kegg_metab_db_table = kegg_metab_dbs$kegg_metab_db_table,
#     outDir, w=NULL, h=NULL)

```

Cox model works on the log hazard:
coef < 0 → HR < 1, protective
coef > 0 → HR > 1, risk
Negative effect (protective)
Strong evidence it’s not zero


# Glycan gene survival analysis

```{r}
databaseDIR = "../results/TCGA/KEGG_metabolism/"
kegg_metab_db_table = 
    readRDS(paste0(databaseDIR, "/KEGG_metabolism_db_table.RDS"))
glycanGenes = 
    kegg_metab_db_table %>% 
    filter(class=="Glycan biosynthesis and metabolism") %>% pull(gene_symbol)

outDir = "../results/SurvivalAnalysis_TCGA/coxreg/Gene/"
outDir %>% dir.create(., recursive=T, showWarnings=FALSE)
metabolicSur_rslts_genes = lapply(cancers2analyze, function(c) {
    print(c)
    meta = openxlsx::read.xlsx(paste0("../data/TCGA/",c,"/Clinical_",c,".xlsx"))
    meta0 = openxlsx::read.xlsx(paste0("../data/TCGA/",c,"/Meta_",c,".xlsx"))
    meta = meta0[, c("cases.submitter_id", "sample.submitter_id", "sample_type")] %>% 
        setNames(c("submitter_id", "sample.submitter_id", "sample_type")) %>%
        dplyr::right_join(meta, by="submitter_id")
    meta$sample.submitter_id = gsub("-", ".", meta$sample.submitter_id)
    meta = meta %>% filter(sample_type == "Primary Tumor")
    normGeneExprFile = paste0("../results/TCGA/Limma_GSVA/",c,"/NormalizedCount.csv")
    normGeneExpr = 
        read.table(normGeneExprFile, 
        sep="\t", header=TRUE) %>%
        filter(Features%in%glycanGenes) #%>%
        #tibble::column_to_rownames(var="Features")
    metabolicSur_rslt = metabolicSurvival_coxreg(meta, GSVAscores=normGeneExpr)
    paste0(outDir, "/", c, "/") %>% 
        dir.create(., recursive=T, showWarnings=FALSE)
    saveRDS(metabolicSur_rslt, paste0(outDir, "/", c, "/metabolicSur_rslt.RDS"))
    openxlsx::write.xlsx(list(metabolicSur_rslt)%>%setNames(c), 
        file=paste0(outDir, "/", c, "/metabolicSur_rslt.xlsx"))
    metabolicSur_rslt
}) %>% setNames(cancers2analyze)



outDir = "../results/SurvivalAnalysis_TCGA/Kaplan_Meier/Gene/"
outDir %>% dir.create(., recursive=T, showWarnings=FALSE)
metabolicSur_rslts_genes = lapply(cancers2analyze, function(c) {
    print(c)
    meta = openxlsx::read.xlsx(paste0("../data/TCGA/",c,"/Clinical_",c,".xlsx"))
    meta0 = openxlsx::read.xlsx(paste0("../data/TCGA/",c,"/Meta_",c,".xlsx"))
    meta = meta0[, c("cases.submitter_id", "sample.submitter_id", "sample_type")] %>% 
        setNames(c("submitter_id", "sample.submitter_id", "sample_type")) %>%
        dplyr::right_join(meta, by="submitter_id")
    meta$sample.submitter_id = gsub("-", ".", meta$sample.submitter_id)
    meta = meta %>% filter(sample_type == "Primary Tumor")
    normGeneExprFile = paste0("../results/TCGA/Limma_GSVA/",c,"/NormalizedCount.csv")
    normGeneExpr = 
        read.table(normGeneExprFile, 
        sep="\t", header=TRUE) %>%
        filter(Features%in%glycanGenes) #%>%
        #tibble::column_to_rownames(var="Features")
    paste0(outDir, "/", c, "/") %>% 
        dir.create(., recursive=T, showWarnings=FALSE)
    metabolicSur_rslt = 
        metabolicSurvival_Kaplan_Meier(meta, 
        GSVAscores=normGeneExpr, outdir=paste0(outDir, "/", c, "/"))
    saveRDS(metabolicSur_rslt, paste0(outDir, "/", c, "/metabolicSur_rslt.RDS"))
    openxlsx::write.xlsx(list(metabolicSur_rslt)%>%setNames(c), 
        file=paste0(outDir, "/", c, "/metabolicSur_rslt.xlsx"))
    metabolicSur_rslt
}) %>% setNames(cancers2analyze)


```


```{r}
out = capture.output(sessionInfo())
writeLines(out, paste0(outDir, "/sessionInfo.txt"))

```

```{r}

```
